reveals the personality of the individual. This is the Ascen
dant. But this is always related to the two adjoining houses,
the twelfth and the second. The twelfth house governs the
hidden elements that run through the self-direction of life.
Here we come across the lingering moods, fears and obliga
tions. These things are powerful forces in life; for they can as

Directions: Preliminaries 101
well lead to bitter opposition, confinement, imprisonment,
insanity and so on. Likewise the twelfth house indicates also
the hidden sources of strength, power and will. In other words
it is both a constructive and a destructive house. The same
reasoning points out that the second house reveals all that is
in store for the native. While the twelfth house supports or
strengthens or weakens out of past experience and gives the
background, the second house expands or spreads forth the
personality laying out all the resources. Thus successful per
